name: openkeepsake
description: Local-first asset workflows for AI coding agents, with a Codex plugin adapter for immediate task review and reusable asset capture.

interface.shortDescription: Capture reusable work and trigger immediate task review.
interface.longDescription: Provides the shared asset-capture workflow for OpenKeepsake. Pair it with the installer to add the stable /memory-review skill route, plus the optional /prompts:memory-review compatibility entrypoint, background refresh, and nightly organization.
defaultPrompt: Update my asset registry after this task and rebuild the overview.
Capture reusable knowledge from this thread into local assets.
